name: Xponential Fitness, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Xponential Fitness, Inc. (the Company or XPO Inc.) through its principal operating subsidiary, Xponential Fitness LLC (XPO LLC), and other subsidiaries, is one of the leading global franchisors of boutique health and wellness brands. We operate a diversified platform of five brands spanning across verticals including Pilates, barre, stretching, functional training, and yoga.
